species_details: Green microalga grown diurnally (16h light/8h dark) under 100 µmol photons m−2 s−1, shifted to 400 µmol photons m−2 s−1 high light
technique: RNA-seq · Illumina HiSeq 2500 · paired-end · Cuffdiff-based differential expression
induction_details: Shift from medium light (100 µmol photons m−2 s−1) to high light (400 µmol photons m−2 s−1); time-course sampling from 0.5 h to 12 h with quadruplicate replicates

contrast_descriptions.HL_vs_ML: log2(High Light / Medium Light) across matched time points
